title: Fix a typo in longrun pipeline

body: This PR adds a flame graph where `step!` is called, and then all of the callbacks are called.
title: Add flame graph for callbacks

body:
This PR:
 - adds `ᶜρh` to the cache, to avoid dynamic allocations which, interestingly, only seems to appear in the threaded functions
 - Unifies the (specialized) threaded and (generic) unthreaded `Wfact!` functions.
title: Unify wfact, cache enthalpy
